text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "The process masquerades as a JPEG image but is an executable. It acts as a self-extracting archive (indicated by 'RarSFX1' directory name), dropping a suspicious executable named 'winx64_payload.exe' and a decoy image 'Kali_Image.png' into a temporary directory.",
  "indicators": [
    "double extension (.jpeg.exe)",
    "execution from Downloads folder",
    "self-extracting archive behavior",
    "dropping 'payload.exe'",
    "dropping decoy image"
  ]
}
